prompt: Deploy security patch to all running nodes concurrently.
agent_thoughts: Orchestrator: Splitting this task into 3 sub-tasks to maximize speed.
plan: Spawn 3 agents. Each agent checks nodes_patched, applies patch, and increments.
patch: None. The execution environment state became corrupted.
reason: Race Condition. All 3 agents read nodes_patched=0 simultaneously, patched node 1 concurrently, and set nodes_patched=1. Nodes 2 and 3 remained unpatched.
